Though they favor solationism; the Wardens crave martial victories as much as any Clansman: Despite being unwilling participants in the invasion of the Inner Sphere they considered it matter of nonor do their best. Path Restrictions: Severe path restrictions apply to Clan characters based on their birth status and caste These restric- tions are described at each stage under the Clan Characters heading: Clan characters who do not follow these restrictions are branded as dark caste (see Leaving the Clans).
